seo.title: About Setu Technology | Our story
seo.description: Setu Technology builds operator-first business software for businesses globally. Learn about our story, mission and team.

hero.headline: We build software the way operators wish someone would
hero.subheadline: Setu Technology started with one question: why does business software make running a business harder, not easier?

story.headline: Our story
paragraphs: Setu means 'bridge' — and that's exactly what we set out to build: a bridge between how businesses actually run day-to-day, and the software meant to support them.

We started with restaurants because the problem was the clearest there — billing mistakes during rush hour, kitchen orders going wrong, owners with no visibility across outlets. Setu Dine was built directly with restaurant owners, outlet managers and kitchen staff, not in a boardroom.
What we learned building Setu Dine — about tax compliance, multi-outlet operations, and what business owners globally actually need — is now the foundation for everything else we build.

mission.headline: Our mission
mission.body: To build practical, honest software for every kind of business across the globe — starting with restaurants, and expanding one industry at a time.

items.heading: Operator-first
items.body: Every feature starts with a real business owner's problem, not a feature checklist.

items.heading: Built for global operators
items.body: Local tax rules, local payments, multi-currency and local context are the default, not an add-on.

items.heading: Honest, not hyped
items.body: We'd rather under-promise and show you the product than oversell it.

cta.headline: Want to see what we're building?
cta.subtext: Start with Setu Dine, our restaurant management product.
